//: Committed, team-shared Claude Code config. Personal prefs go in settings.local.json.

PostToolUse.//: ADR guard (soft): nudge when an architectural file is edited without ADR work. See ADR-0004.

Stop.//: CLAUDE.md currency: if code changed under a scoped CLAUDE.md but the file wasn't revised, drive a review. Once per session. See ADR-0004.
